ProjectInfo.ObjectivesDetails: At Hotmart, I joined the team as a front-end developer, where I helped build and maintain internal privacy applications that were essential for the company. My focus was always on delivering clean, reliable code and creating features that made a real impact for both users and the business.
ProjectInfo.Heading: Challenge
Details: At Hotmart, I was hands-on in developing and maintaining privacy-focused internal apps that protected sensitive data and kept the company compliant with regulations. I loved the challenge of building new features and solving bugs that really mattered to the business.

I worked closely with cross-functional teams to turn business needs into practical, secure solutions. Whether it was improving performance, adding internationalization, or creating custom visualizations for legal processes, I always aimed to deliver features that made a difference.
Debugging and troubleshooting were a big part of my day-to-day. I took pride in quickly finding and fixing issues, making sure our apps stayed fast and reliable for everyone.

I built responsive, dynamic UIs with ReactJS and styled-components, focusing on reusability and a smooth user experience. TypeScript helped me keep the codebase organized and bug-free, while context API made state management a breeze.
I also made sure our apps looked great and worked well on every browser and device, handling all the little quirks that come with cross-browser development.
Performance and accessibility were always top of mind. I optimized code, ensured accessibility standards were met, and kept security tight with form sanitization and script blocking.
I was active in code reviews, sharing knowledge and keeping our standards high. I wrote thorough documentation so the team could move quickly and confidently.
Testing was a must—using Jest and React Testing Library, I made sure our components and features were solid before they shipped.
Security and privacy were non-negotiable. I worked to implement strong protections and made sure our apps met all internal and external requirements.
